commonRequirements.label: Licensed financial institution verification
commonRequirements.value: Use MAS's Financial Institutions Directory to verify an institution's licence type and status.

commonRequirements.label: Business account opening for foreign-owned companies
commonRequirements.value: DBS requires ACRA incorporation documents, signatory identity/address verification, and board resolutions before opening a business account; foreign-owned or non-resident-director companies undergo enhanced due diligence and a longer review period.

fintech.label: Fintech licensing check
fintech.value: Payment-service activities require an MAS licensing assessment before launch.
